message:
fix(h2): track last_stream_id for GOAWAY and prevent CONTINUATION interleaving

Bug 1: CONTINUATION frames were pushed to the back of pending_ops,
allowing other frame types (PingAck, SettingsAck) to be sent between
HEADERS and CONTINUATION, violating RFC 9113 §6.10. Now pushed to front
in reverse order for correct sequencing.

Bug 2: last_stream_id was never updated after init, so GOAWAY always
reported 0 (no streams processed). Added track_stream_id() called from
process_data() and process_headers().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
